name: @absolutejs/dispatch-resend
description: Resend-backed EmailAdapter for @absolutejs/dispatch. Takes your Resend client; emits standard DispatchResult with the Resend message id.
author: Alex Kahn

scripts.build: rm -rf dist && bun build src/index.ts --outdir dist --sourcemap --target=bun --external @absolutejs/dispatch --external resend && tsc --project tsconfig.build.json
scripts.release: bun run format && bun run build && bun publish
